description: Natural language vs prior-40% baseline vs improved anchor for read_file

companion_descriptions.write_file: Writes a file to the local filesystem. Supports diff preview before commit.
companion_descriptions.edit_text: Performs exact string replacements in files. Supports undo via preview before applying.
companion_descriptions.find_text:
- Fast content search tool that works with any codebase size
- Searches file contents using regular expressions. Supports structured results with line numbers.
companion_descriptions.diff: Show or apply unified diffs of pending edits.

variants.description: Read text contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
Read a file's contents. Changes are tracked and can be previewed before saving to disk. Supports offset/limit for partial reads.
Read any file from the filesystem and return its contents. Supports offset/limit for partial reads.
Read a file's contents. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Changes are tracked and can be previewed before saving.
variants.hypothesis: Value last -- readability first, tracking second
